data.name: GenericError
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: OperationCancelled
data.value: The operation was cancelled.

data.name: FleetOperationsError.VehicleNotFound
data.value: Vehicle not found.

data.name: FleetOperationsError.VehicleAlreadyAssigned
data.value: The vehicle is already assigned to an operator.

data.name: FleetOperationsError.HaulingCycleNotFound
data.value: Hauling cycle not found.

data.name: FleetOperationsError.InvalidPayload
data.value: Invalid payload value. Payload must be greater than 0.

data.name: FleetOperationsError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Fleet operation was cancelled.

data.name: FleetOperationsError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during fleet operation.

data.name: FleetOperationsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Fleet Operations.

data.name: MaterialOperationsError.MaterialNotFound
data.value: Material batch not found.

data.name: MaterialOperationsError.InvalidMineralType
data.value: Invalid mineral type. Allowed values: Gold, Silver, Copper.

data.name: MaterialOperationsError.InvalidPayload
data.value: Invalid payload value. Payload must be greater than 0.

data.name: MaterialOperationsError.MaterialAlreadyClassified
data.value: The material batch is already classified.

data.name: MaterialOperationsError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Material operation was cancelled.

data.name: MaterialOperationsError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during material operation.

data.name: MaterialOperationsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Material Operations.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.MaterialNotFound
data.value: Jewelry material not found.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.CertificateNotFound
data.value: Certificate not found.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.InvalidQRCode
data.value: Invalid QR code format. Must be 6–100 alphanumeric characters, hyphens, or underscores.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.MaterialAlreadyCertified
data.value: The material is already certified or the certificate has already been signed.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.InvalidStatus
data.value: Invalid material status. Allowed: NonCertified, Certified, Pending.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Jewelry inventory operation was cancelled.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during jewelry inventory operation.

data.name: JewelryInventoryError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Jewelry Inventory.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.ProductNotFound
data.value: Product not found for the given QR code.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.CertificateNotFound
data.value: Certificate not found.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.AccessDenied
data.value: Access to this resource is denied.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.InvalidQRCode
data.value: Invalid QR code provided.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.LanguageNotSupported
data.value: The requested language is not supported. Supported languages: en, es.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Consumer traceability operation was cancelled.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during consumer traceability operation.

data.name: ConsumerTraceabilityError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Consumer Traceability.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.AssetNotFound
data.value: Asset not found.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.TelemetryDataNotFound
data.value: Telemetry data not found.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.TemperatureReadingNotFound
data.value: Temperature reading not found for this asset.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.CommunicationChannelNotFound
data.value: Communication channel record not found for this asset.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.GNSSStatusNotFound
data.value: GNSS status record not found for this asset.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.SpeedReadingNotFound
data.value: Speed reading not found for this asset.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.PressureReadingNotFound
data.value: Pressure reading not found for this asset.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.InvalidTemperature
data.value: Invalid temperature value provided.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.InvalidSpeed
data.value: Invalid speed value provided.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.InvalidPressure
data.value: Invalid pressure value provided.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.InvalidProtocol
data.value: Invalid communication protocol provided.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.InvalidAnomalyType
data.value: Invalid anomaly type provided.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.InvalidPressureType
data.value: Invalid pressure type provided.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Monitoring telemetry operation was cancelled.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during monitoring telemetry operation.

data.name: MonitoringTelemetryError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Monitoring Telemetry.

data.name: AnalyticsError.MaterialNotFound
data.value: The material record was not found.

data.name: AnalyticsError.RouteNotFound
data.value: The route was not found.

data.name: AnalyticsError.InvalidProductionPeriod
data.value: Invalid production period: start must be earlier than end.

data.name: AnalyticsError.InsufficientData
data.value: Insufficient data to complete the analytics operation.

data.name: AnalyticsError.ProductionDataValidationFailed
data.value: Production data validation failed.

data.name: AnalyticsError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Analytics operation was cancelled.

data.name: AnalyticsError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the analytics operation.

data.name: AnalyticsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Analytics.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.IncidentNotFound
data.value: The incident record was not found.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.InvalidRiskLevel
data.value: Invalid risk level. Allowed values: Low, Medium, High, Critical.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.InvalidIncidentType
data.value: Invalid incident type. Allowed values: Fatigue, Smoke, Accident.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.IncidentAlreadyCommitted
data.value: The incident has already been committed.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.RiskLevelValidationFailed
data.value: Risk level validation failed for this incident.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Incident management operation was cancelled.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the incident management operation.

data.name: IncidentManagementError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Incident Management.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.ReportNotFound
data.value: The report was not found.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.NotificationNotFound
data.value: The notification was not found.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.InvalidReportFormat
data.value: Invalid report format. Allowed values: PDF, Excel, CSV.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.ReportAlreadyExported
data.value: The report has already been exported.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.AccidentValidationFailed
data.value: Accident data validation failed.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.ReportValidationFailed
data.value: Report validation failed.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.NotificationValidationFailed
data.value: Notification validation failed.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Reporting operation was cancelled.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the reporting operation.

data.name: ReportingNotificationsError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Reporting and Notifications.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.MachineryNotFound
data.value: The machinery asset was not found.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.ComponentNotFound
data.value: The component was not found on this machinery.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.MachineryAlreadyDischarged
data.value: The machinery has already been discharged.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.InvalidEngineHours
data.value: Invalid engine hours value provided.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.MaintenanceAlreadyScheduled
data.value: Preventive maintenance is already scheduled for this machinery.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Asset maintenance operation was cancelled.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the asset maintenance operation.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Asset and Maintenance Management.

data.name: IamError.UserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: IamError.InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid username or password.

data.name: IamError.UsernameAlreadyExists
data.value: Username is already taken.

data.name: IamError.EmailAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Email is already registered.

data.name: IamError.InvalidRole
data.value: Invalid role. Allowed: Operator, Supervisor, Administrator, Jeweler, Consumer.

data.name: IamError.OperationCancelled
data.value: IAM operation was cancelled.

data.name: IamError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the IAM operation.

data.name: IamError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in IAM.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.UserSubscriptionNotFound
data.value: User subscription not found.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.InvoiceNotFound
data.value: Invoice not found.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.InvalidPlanType
data.value: Invalid plan type. Allowed: Free, Basic, Professional, Enterprise.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.InvalidBillingCycle
data.value: Invalid billing cycle. Allowed: Monthly, Annual.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.PaymentMethodValidationFailed
data.value: Payment method validation failed.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.FeatureNotAvailableInPlan
data.value: Feature not available in the current plan.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.DowngradeNotAllowed
data.value: Downgrade is not allowed for this subscription.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.AccessDenied
data.value: Access to this feature is denied.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Subscriptions and billing operation was cancelled.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the subscriptions and billing operation.

data.name: SubscriptionsBillingError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Subscriptions and Billing.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.OperationCancelled
data.value: Asset maintenance operation was cancelled.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred during the asset maintenance operation.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal error occurred in Asset and Maintenance Management.

data.value: The machinery asset was not found.

data.value: No se encontró el activo de maquinaria.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.InvalidEngineHours
data.value: Invalid engine hours value provided.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.MaintenanceAlreadyScheduled
data.value: Preventive maintenance is already scheduled for this machinery.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.MachineryAlreadyDischarged
data.value: The machinery has already been discharged.

data.name: AssetMaintenanceError.ComponentNotFound
data.value: The component was not found on this machinery.

data.value: The incident record was not found.

data.value: Invalid risk level. Allowed values: Low, Medium, High, Critical.

data.name: RiskLevelEscalated
data.value: Risk level escalated successfully.

data.name: RiskLevelUpdated
data.value: Risk level evaluated and updated successfully.

data.name: RiskLevelAlertCommitted
data.value: Risk level alert sent and committed successfully.

data.name: SmokeDetected
data.value: Smoke detected and recorded successfully.

data.name: SmokeAlertCommitted
data.value: Smoke alert committed successfully.

data.name: AccidentCommitted
data.value: Accident recorded and committed successfully.
